title: subscribe_events: implicit 3-tuple state — name the struct
description: client.rs:219-302: the unfold state is Option<(ByteStream, String, usize)>. The relationship between buf and scan_from (scan_from must be a valid char boundary of buf) is a class invariant enforced only by comments. The destructuring pattern reappears on every loop iteration. Rewrite: define a private struct SseStreamState { stream: ByteStream, buf: String, scan_from: usize } and use Option<SseStreamState> as the unfold state. The struct name makes the invariant documentable and eliminates destructuring noise.
